# reaffirmationagreement.org

> Guide to reaffirmation agreements in bankruptcy -- keeping property by agreeing to continue paying.

reaffirmationagreement.org is a free, open-source educational resource about reaffirmation agreements in Chapter 7 bankruptcy. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://reaffirmationagreement.org/: Overview of reaffirmation agreements -- what they are and when they make sense
- https://reaffirmationagreement.org/car-reaffirmation.html: Car reaffirmation -- keeping your vehicle in Chapter 7
- https://reaffirmationagreement.org/mortgage-reaffirmation.html: Mortgage reaffirmation -- keeping your home
- https://reaffirmationagreement.org/risks.html: Risks of reaffirmation -- why judges sometimes refuse to approve them
- https://reaffirmationagreement.org/rescission.html: Rescission -- canceling a reaffirmation agreement within 60 days

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
